subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。親指の輪に4本の指を上から入れ、親指手前側の糸を取ります。取った糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Begin in Opening A. Insert all four fingers from above into the thumb loops and pick up from below the near thumb strings; the taken strings fall away naturally to the far wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、手の甲にかかる手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near strings that lie across the backs of the hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、全ての糸の下を通って小指向こうの糸を上から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pass under all the strings and move over and pick down the far little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 右親指の輪を人差し指ではさみます。左親指から糸を外し、右親指手前の糸を上から取り輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Pinch the right-thumb loop with the index finger. Release the string from the left thumb, then move over and pick down the near right-thumb string and open the loop.

subtitle.ja: 左親指の輪を人差し指ではさみます。右親指から糸を外し、左親指の輪に下から入れて輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Pinch the left-thumb loop with the index finger. Release the string from the right thumb, insert the thumb from below into the left-thumb loop, and open the loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、親指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指と小指から全ての糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from both thumbs and little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 右手の甲の糸を左手で持ち、右中指にかけ、右中指の糸と合わせて持ちます。右手から全ての糸を外します
subtitle.en: Take the string lying on the back of the right hand with the left hand, place it onto the right middle finger and hold it together with the existing middle-finger string; release all strings from the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 右手の甲から外した輪に右小指を、右中指から外した輪に右親指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the right little finger from below into the loop removed from the back of the right hand, and insert the right thumb from below into the loop removed from the right middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手も同様に、手の甲と中指の糸を右手で持って左手を外し、2つの輪に親指と小指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: In the same way on the left hand, take the strings from the back of the hand and the middle finger with the right hand, release the left hand, and insert the thumb and little finger from below into the two loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の輪に人差し指を上から入れ、親指向こうの糸を取ります。人差し指の糸を親指で押さえながら両手を左右に開いて完成です
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the little-finger loops and move over and pick down the far thumb strings. Hold the index-finger strings in place with the thumbs and open the hands to the sides to show the finished figure.
